description_for_human: Autonomous critical infrastructure dispatch orchestrator. Coordinates field technician dispatches using multi-agent AI with real-time visualization.
description_for_model: OmniDispatch is a multi-agent orchestration system for critical infrastructure failures. Use this plugin to: (1) List pending technician dispatch assignments via 'listNewAssignments', (2) Render interactive Fluent UI map widgets showing technician routes and severity heatmaps via 'showAssignmentsOnMap', (3) Check real-time pipeline status and agent health via 'getDispatchStatus'. The map widget supports light/dark Copilot Canvas themes and renders directly in the conversation.
